home.title: Home
home.lead: {{tenantName}} helps people exchange skills, support, and practical help using time credits.
home.fallbackTagline: A community platform for exchanging time, skills, and support.
home.sectionBody: Members can offer help, request support, join events, share resources, and build trusted local connections.

about.title: About
about.lead: Learn how this community uses time credits to recognise everyone's contribution.
about.body: Project NEXUS supports multi-tenant timebanking communities with public information pages and private member tools.

help.title: Help
help.lead: Find support for joining, taking part, and using your community account.
help.body: For account-specific help, contact the community team or sign in to the member app.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: Get in touch with the community team.
contact.body: Use the published contact details for this community, or return to the member app if you already have an account.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.lead: Common questions about timebanking and community participation.
faq.body: Timebanking lets people exchange support using time as the unit of value. One hour given earns one time credit.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.lead: Privacy information for public visitors and community members.
privacy.body: This public page is prepared for tenant-managed privacy content. Member-specific privacy controls remain inside the secure app.

terms.title: Terms
terms.lead: Terms and participation information for this community.
terms.body: This public page is prepared for tenant-managed terms content. Community administrators can publish fuller CMS content through the platform.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.lead: Accessibility information for Project NEXUS public pages.
accessibility.body: Project NEXUS provides a modern React member app and a separate accessible frontend track for users who prefer a highly accessible HTML-first experience.

blog.title: Blog
blog.lead: News and updates from this community.
blog.empty: No public posts are available yet.

blogDetail.title: Blog post
blogDetail.missing: This public post is not available in the shadow frontend yet.

cmsPage.missing: This public page is not available in the shadow frontend yet.

publicCollection.empty: No public items are available yet.

listings.title: Listings
listings.lead: Browse public offers and requests from {{tenantName}}.
listings.body: This shadow page is prepared for public listings discovery. Creating, editing, and member-only listing tools stay in the secure Vite app.

listingDetail.title: Listing
listingDetail.body: This shadow page is prepared for public listing details. Booking and editing actions remain in the secure Vite app.

events.title: Events
events.body: This shadow page is prepared for public event discovery. Event creation, RSVP management, and edits stay in the secure Vite app.

eventDetail.title: Event
eventDetail.body: This shadow page is prepared for public event details. Attendance and organiser actions remain in the secure Vite app.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.body: This shadow page is prepared for public job discovery. Applications and employer workflows stay in the secure Vite app.

jobDetail.title: Job
jobDetail.body: This shadow page is prepared for public job details. Applications and pipeline actions remain in the secure Vite app.

organisations.title: Organisations
organisations.body: This shadow page is prepared for public organisation discovery. Organisation administration remains in the secure Vite app.

organisationDetail.title: Organisation
organisationDetail.body: This shadow page is prepared for public organisation details. Management actions remain in the secure Vite app.

resources.title: Resources
resources.body: This shadow page is prepared for public resource discovery. Resource management remains in the secure Vite app.

kb.title: Knowledge Base
kb.lead: Find public guidance and help articles from {{tenantName}}.
kb.body: This shadow page is prepared for public knowledge-base discovery. Article management remains in the secure Vite app.

kbDetail.title: Knowledge Base Article
kbDetail.body: This shadow page is prepared for public knowledge-base article details. Editing remains in the secure Vite app.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.body: This shadow page is prepared for public marketplace discovery. Checkout, seller, and listing management stay in the secure Vite app.

marketplaceSearch.title: Marketplace Search
marketplaceSearch.body: This shadow page is prepared for public marketplace search. Offers, checkout, and listing management stay in the secure Vite app.

marketplaceMap.title: Marketplace Map
marketplaceMap.body: This shadow page is prepared for public marketplace map discovery. Location filters and seller tools stay in the secure Vite app.

marketplaceCollections.title: Marketplace Collections
marketplaceCollections.lead: Browse curated public marketplace collections from {{tenantName}}.
marketplaceCollections.body: This shadow page is prepared for public marketplace collections. Collection management stays in the secure Vite app.

marketplaceFree.title: Free Items
marketplaceFree.lead: Browse free public marketplace items from {{tenantName}}.
marketplaceFree.body: This shadow page is prepared for public free-item discovery. Pickup coordination and listing management stay in the secure Vite app.

marketplaceDetail.title: Marketplace Item
marketplaceDetail.lead: View public marketplace item information from {{tenantName}}.
marketplaceDetail.body: This shadow page is prepared for public marketplace item details. Offers, checkout, and editing remain in the secure Vite app.
